observations: The meta-banner appears prominently above the fold with working spec and seed links, fulfilling the most critical requirement from the philosophy.
The page defaults to light mode with a clean editorial serif hero — consistent with the 'editorial-meets-technical' aesthetic direction and the inviolable no-dark-mode-default principle.
In the 'How It Works' section, the /rs-spec and /rs-impl skill cards appear to have content partially obscured by a dark overlay element, making their descriptions harder to read.
The methodology SVG diagram is present but renders quite small in the viewport, which may reduce its legibility and impact as the core visual explanation of the hierarchy.
The Before/After comparison and Open Source CTA sections are well-structured with real content — no lorem ipsum or placeholder text visible.
